title: allium margaritaceum
intro: Allium margaritaceum, also known as the pearl onion, is a species of flowering plant in the onion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Allium margaritaceum include its ability to reduce cholesterol levels, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the bulb of the plant is typically dried and used as a powder or tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
